items.title: “we recruit exceptional individuals who practice medicine and work in hospitals. However, when it’s time to offer them permanent positions, we go through the process all over again, as they must pass a competitive exam. This only complicates matters for everyone involved”
„Concurența vine mai ales din China, unde producția este mai ieftină și mai rapidă. Eu nu vreau să folosesc materiale mai slabe și nu scad standardele, chiar dacă aș putea vinde mai ieftin”
"Bestes Spiel, das ich als Trainer erlebt habe"
"These days, anything that produces data can be investigated scientifically - that includes culture,"
“Europa is het snelst opwarmende continent en de gevolgen zijn nu al ernstig”
„Es entstehen Schwierigkeiten, wenn nur die eigene Unterschiedlichkeit betont wird – mit Bräuchen und Traditionen, die mitunter im Widerspruch zu unserer Kultur und Identität stehen“
